Records.location: Section 3.2, Figure 10(e), Table 3, also Sections 2.2 and 2.1
Records.description: Two-loop four-point integral with elliptic function class, containing 5 massive and 1 massless internal propagator across 5 vertices. Three external legs massless, one massive ($p_4^2=m^2$). Used extensively in the paper to benchmark median QMC rules vs CBC lattice construction, demonstrating the effect of unlucky lattices. Previously existing pySecDec example.

Used extensively in the paper to benchmark median QMC rules vs CBC lattice construction, demonstrating the effect of unlucky lattices. Previously existing pySecDec example.

Records.authors: Winterhalder, R., Magerya, V., Villa, E., Jones, S.P., Kerner, M., Butter, A., Heinrich, G., Plehn, T.
Records.description: Two-loop four-point function occurring in Higgs+jet production via gluon fusion at two loops, with an elliptic sub-sector. Six propagators: five massive (mass m, top quark) and one massless. Four external legs: p1, p2, p3 massless (gluons/jet); p4 off-shell (Higgs, p4^2=m_H^2). Has 5 Feynman parameters and depends on four kinematic invariants (s, t, m^2, p4^2). Analytic results contain elliptic functions. Matches pySecDec example elliptic2L_physical. Used as benchmark for neural network contour deformation optimization.

Records.authors: Correia, Miguel, Giroux, Mathieu, Mizera, Sebastian
Records.description: Two-loop H+jet with closed top loop. 6 propagators (5 massive top, 1 massless). Maximal cut reveals elliptic curve.
